assets.title: Underroot Corridor
assets.cropNotes: Center-cropped and downsampled to 392x220. Strong depth read; side-stone ornament bands were reviewed at game scale and do not read as text.
assets.humanEditNotes: Batch 01 draft previewed in Visual Gallery. Approved for future manifest-gated dungeon plate wiring; no generated text was visible at 392x220 review scale.

assets.title: Underroot Combat
assets.reviewFocus: enemy contrast, floor contact, no text
assets.cropNotes: Center-cropped and downsampled to 392x220. Good enemy stage and floor contact read.
assets.humanEditNotes: Approved after Visual Gallery and Combat Sandbox composition review. Eligible for future gameplay wiring through the manifest; do not reference the raw file path from gameplay data.

assets.title: Rootbitten Wolf
assets.cropNotes: Batch 02 source downsampled to 96x128. Stronger connected body silhouette than batch 01, with fewer rear-leg/twig islands at sprite scale.
assets.matteOrMaskNotes: Flat blue-gray background removed with tolerance 54 from edge-connected matte. Edge read passed checkerboard and approved combat-background review.
assets.humanEditNotes: Batch 02 draft selected from six generated candidates. Approved after checkerboard alpha review plus Combat Sandbox composition review.

assets.title: Blood Edge
assets.cropNotes: Center-cropped and downsampled to 64x48. Blade reads at tiny size; abstract wall marks are non-textural scratches, not readable glyphs.
assets.humanEditNotes: Approved after Visual Gallery tiny-crop review. Eligible for future card-art wiring through the manifest; do not reference the raw file path from gameplay data.

assets.title: UI Ornaments
assets.reviewFocus: panel corners, status frames, palette restraint
assets.cropNotes: Center-cropped to 1024x1024 for preview. Source is strong but landscape; final UI slicing should return to raw source or request square composition.
assets.humanEditNotes: Batch 01 draft reviewed in Visual Gallery. Strong motifs but wrong sheet composition for approval.
assets.rejectionNotes: Rejected for approval: landscape source loses too many elements in square preview. Rerun with strict square-sheet composition or slice deliberately from raw source.
